text: Because your beautiful smile makes even my worst days feel instantly better, Kashish.
Because you have this unwavering belief in me, even when I struggle to believe in myself.
Because your laugh is my absolute favorite sound in the entire universe.
Because every single adventure, no matter how small, feels magical when I am with you, Kashish.
Because you make ordinary, mundane moments feel completely unforgettable.
Because you make me want to grow and become a better version of myself every day.
Because your warm hugs feel like coming home after a long, tiring journey.
Because my life became infinitely more beautiful the very day I met you, Kashish.
Because every day spent by your side is a gift I will cherish forever.
Because you listen to my endless rants with the utmost patience and care.
Because the way your hand interlocks with mine feels like a perfect fit, Kashish.
Because you notice the smallest details about me that even I overlook.
Because you support my wildest dreams and push me to pursue them, Kashish.
Because of your kind, generous soul that always wants to heal the world.
Because you look absolutely breathtaking in the morning sun, with no makeup on at all.
Because the sound of you humming in the kitchen is my favorite daily melody, Kashish.
Because you know how to make me laugh until my stomach hurts.
Because your eyes hold a universe of love that makes me melt every time I look into them.
Because you make the most delicious coffee and always share the last sip with me, Kashish.
Because you are my safest place, my sanctuary in this loud and hectic world.
Because of the goofy face you pull just to make me smile when I am feeling down.
Because you are incredibly strong, resilient, and inspire me with your courage, Kashish.
Because you forgive my mistakes with a grace that teaches me how to love better.
Because you tell me the truth, even when it is hard for me to hear it.
Because your kindness extends to every animal and plant we pass on our walks, Kashish.
Because of our silent, midnight conversations where we talk about the meaning of life.
Because your voice notes are a treasure I play on loop whenever I miss you.
Because you make even simple grocery shopping trips feel like a romantic date night.
Because you care for me so tenderly when I fall sick, Kashish.
Because you are my favorite distraction and the anchor to my focus.
Because you remember how I like my tea and always brew it perfectly, Kashish.
Because of the cute way you squeeze my hand three times to say 'I love you' in public.
Because you have colored my black-and-white world with your beautiful spirit.
Because I still get butterflies in my stomach every single time I see you, Kashish.
Because you steal the blankets at night, but always cuddle close to keep me warm.
Because of your absolute dedication to reading and buying books you never finish, Kashish.
Because you hold my hand tightly when crossing streets, making me feel so needed.
Because you are my today, my tomorrow, and my absolute forever, Kashish.
Because we share the same silly sense of humor and understand each other's inside jokes.
Because your heart is a beautiful garden of warmth and compassion.
Because you look so stunning when you dress up, but even prettier in my oversized hoodies, Kashish.
Because of the cute, shiver-like sneeze you have that makes me giggle every time.
Because you never let us go to sleep angry, always resolving our arguments with love.
Because you are my partner-in-crime for late-night ice cream runs, Kashish.
Because you check up on me throughout the day just to see if I had lunch.
Because you make me feel like I am the most important person in your life, Kashish.
Because you are so fiercely loyal and protect the ones you love with all your might.
Because we can spend hours in comfortable silence without a single awkward second.
Because you have taught me how to be more patient and understanding, Kashish.
Because your touch has a magical way of calming my racing heart.
Because you keep every dry rose and love letter I give you inside your thickest novels, Kashish.
Because you appreciate my bad puns and pretend to roll your eyes while smiling.
Because you trust me with your deepest secrets and vulnerable thoughts.
Because you look so cute when you are stubborny defending your favorite movie characters, Kashish.
Because you are my favorite travel companion, ready to explore any corner of the map.
Because you always make sure my collar is straight and hair is neat before I go out.
Because you have this beautiful, child-like excitement when it begins to rain, Kashish.
Because you are the best listener, holding space for my fears and doubts.
Because your handwriting is as beautiful and elegant as your soul.
Because your presence is a beautiful light that guides me home, Kashish.
Because we can turn a simple balcony tea session into a core memory.
Because you make me believe that soulmates are real and that I found mine in you, Kashish.
Because you are not afraid to be completely goofy and unpolished around me.
Because you hold my face in your warm hands when you want to make a point, Kashish.
Because you have the most beautiful, infectious energy that lights up any room you enter.
Because you always ask me to drive safely and text you as soon as I arrive.
Because your support is the silent strength behind every success I achieve, Kashish.
Because you buy cute mugs and name them after our imaginary pets.
Because you always save the last slice of cake for me, even if it is your favorite flavor, Kashish.
Because you write the sweetest cards that I keep locked in my desk drawer.
Because you make me feel completely safe to express my emotions without judgment, Kashish.
Because you have this lovely habit of playing with your rings when you are nervous.
Because your dreams are now woven together with mine in a beautiful tapestry.
Because you are my comfort food, my favorite blanket, and my warm cup of tea, Kashish.
Because you love watching sunsets and sharing those quiet skies with me.
Because you make me laugh at myself and not take life too seriously.
Because your heart holds a well of wisdom that guides me when I am confused, Kashish.
Because you tuck your head into my chest when you are feeling shy.
Because of the beautiful, gentle way you touch my hair when I am falling asleep.
Because you look like an angel in traditional sarees, leaving me completely speechless, Kashish.
Because you are my best friend first, and my lover second.
Because of the spontaneous picnics we organize in the middle of our living room floor.
Because you celebrate my smallest achievements like I won a gold medal, Kashish.
Because you hold a key to a part of my heart that nobody else ever reached.
Because you make me feel like I am home, no matter where we physically are, Kashish.
Because you teach me the true beauty of compromise and empathy every day.
Because you have a beautiful way of seeing good in every person you meet.
Because your soft kisses on my cheek can chase away all my stress in a second, Kashish.
Because you make our future look so bright and full of exciting possibilities.
Because you stand by me, shoulder to shoulder, ready to face whatever life throws at us.
Because you appreciate my cooking, even when I accidentally oversalt the rice, Kashish.
Because you have a gentle heart that makes you cry at happy endings of animated movies.
Because you make me feel incredibly loved and valued every single second, Kashish.
Because you always know when I need a hug, even before I realize it myself.
Because you share your headphones and let me listen to your secret playlist.
Because you are the gravity that keeps my chaotic thoughts anchored, Kashish.
Because you have made my life a beautiful, glowing fairytale that I never want to end.
Because you are the greatest blessing, the best surprise, and my favorite gift, Kashish.
Because of the beautiful promise we share to keep choosing each other every day, forever.
Because you are you—Kashish, my love, my everything, today and for all my tomorrows.
